sections.text:
The following data is from the Alumni Details table:
Engineers Day 2025 honoured 25 alumni including Rajeswari Kumaresan from Cisco USA, Ranjani Rajagopalan from Mphasis as Sr Technical Lead, Benny Diwakar S from Bank of America as Asst VP, Sheik Mohamed Rizwan from DXC Technology as Associate Manager, Pavithra Elumalai from TCS as IT Consultant, Shanmugam V from Zyle Software Solutions as CEO, Mohammed Rameez from Zeemrah Energy as Founder, Gatheejaithul Kubra from Sha's Online Academy as Founder, Manimala from Akamai Technology as Data Analyst, Aniruddhan Narayanan from Pfizer Healthcare as Business Analyst Manager, Fayaz Ahmed from Recode Solutions as Sr Solution Architect, Noorul Jaman J from Mindgate Solutions as Sr Manager Product, Abrar Ahmed from Commercial Bank of Dubai, Aswin Panneerselvam from Spark Group - India Zambia Kenya UAE as Director, N Nazhrudeen from Xperthom Technologies as Business Head, Nasarullah from Wipro Dubai as Sr Techno Functional Lead, Razik Fareed from YUBI as Senior Director, Syed Athreeq Ur Rahman from Bahwan Cybertek as Manager, H Barakath Nisha from Wipro as Sr Software Engineer, Linga Prabhu V from Mithran Engineering as CEO, Narenthiran from Virtana Corporation as Team Lead, AbdulHameed N from Rambal Hitech Engineers as Manager, Jamal Shagul Ameedh from General Electric as Commercial Manager, Mohamed Fazil from Equate Petrochemical Kuwait as Sr Instrument Engineer, and Meeraan Sha from Zoho Corporation as Software Technical Consultant on 04.10.2025.
Alumni Aniruddhan, Manager at PFIZER Healthcare India, held a session called An Introduction to Industry Preparedness on 07.08.2025.
Alumni Deepak, CTO at MH Doodle Solutions, held a session called How to Get into IT Sector on 06.08.2025.
Alumni Deepak from the 2011-2015 Batch attended the Academic Advisory Board Meeting on 16.07.2025.
The Silver Jubilee Reunion Meet 2025 Awards were given to Ahamed Jameel AMT (2001-2005) for the Lifetime Achievement Award, J Abdul Rahaman (2001-2005) for the Outstanding Alumni Award, MM Syed Sultan Allaudeen (2003-2007) for the Distinguished Service Award, Yasar (2002-2006) for the Distinguished Service Award, and Asim Ali L for the Outstanding Young Alumni Award 2025 on 01.02.2025.
23 Alumni participated in the Alumni Association Meet on 26.10.2024.
Engineers Day 2024 included Md Kamaal Yasin from TCS as Associate Consultant, A S Balagurunathan from HCL as Project Manager, Chandra Bose from CMA CGM GBSI as Deputy General Manager, Ameena Bathool from Zuora India as Senior Technical Writer, Sivanathan Balaguru from ADF Datascience as Manager Software Engineering, and Sabarish SR from Blossomfield Gamingzone as Founder & CEO on 16.09.2024.
Alumni Rahul Murali, Product Manager at Thoughtworks Technologies, was the Guest of Honour at the First Year Induction on 09.09.2024.
Alumni Dr Ezhilazhagan C, Associate Professor at Veltech, attended the Planning and Monitoring Committee Meeting on 08.07.2024.
Alumni Deepak VR, Senior Data Engineer at Manuh Solutions, attended the Board of Studies Meeting on 06.07.2024.
Alumni Akila Rajeshwari, Associate VP at Casagrand Builder, attended the Board of Studies - Civil Dept on 18.06.2024.

This chunk answers which alumni were honoured on Engineers Day 2025, who received the Lifetime Achievement Award from MSJCE alumni, who received the Outstanding Alumni Award 2025, who received the Outstanding Young Alumni Award, which alumni serve on the MSJCE Board of Studies, which alumni attended Planning and Monitoring Board meetings, who is Aniruddhan Narayanan in MSJCE alumni, and whether MSJCE alumni attended Academic Advisory Board meetings.

The following data is from the Institution Recognition to Alumni — Historical 2021-2023 table:
Mr. Syed Yasir was the Guest of Honour for the Department Fest on 18/06/2022. Mr. Syed Yasir was on the Judges Panel for the Department Fest on 18/06/2022. Mr. Shaik Abdul Saleem was the Chief Guest for Engineers Day on 15/09/2022. Mr. Mohammed Abdul Muqeet was the Guest of Honour for the Department Fest on 29/06/2023. Mr. Mohammed Abdul Muqeet was the Committee Member for the Department Fest on 29/06/2023.

The following data is from the Alumni Details table:
Board of Studies CSE and IT had Alumni Sivanathan ADF Data Science, Manager on 28.05.2024. Guest of Honour for International Conference on R&D in Engineering, Science and Technology had Alumni Sheikh Azharuddin IT Operation Head NRFSI on 24.05.2024. Guest of Honour for Annual Day had Alumni Suresh Kumar Scientist on 09.03.2024. Guest of Honour for Festaverse had Alumni Aadil Ibrahim Entrepreneur Public Speaker on 05.03.2024. Guest of Honour for Women's Day had Alumni Lakshmi Narayanan Senior HR, Valeo on 04.03.2024. Planning and Monitoring Board Meeting had Alumni Majed Arafat on 16.12.2023. Academic Advisory Board Meeting had Alumni Secretary Ahamed Jameel and Srikanth K on 09.12.2023. Golden Jubilee Celebration at Mohamed Sathak Trust in Keelakari included Ahamed Jameel Best Alumni Service Award, Md Rizwan and Purushothaman Guest of Honour on 14.10.2023. Engineers Day 2023 had 1. Majed Arafat A IT Consultant TCS, 2. Abdurrahim Salih GV Academy Best Entrepreneur, 3. Misbah Khairunnissa Savista, Senior Manager, 4. S Ram Prabhu QBurst Technologies, Senior QA Engineer and 5. Mikail Ismail KLA, Technical Writer on 16.09.2023. First Year Induction Guest of Honour had Alumni Sheikh Azharuddin Nissan Renault Financial Services IT Operation Head on 11.09.2023. Planning and Monitoring Meeting had Alumni Majed Arafat (TCS), Alumni Jaleel (Founder Kings Travels), Alumni Samir (Fidelity National Financial, Cyber Security Manager) on 20.05.2023. Academic Advisory Board Meeting had Alumni Ahamed Jameel, Misbah (Savista Sr HR Manager), Shiblee (Founder Debugger) on 13.05.2023. Guest of Honour had Alumni Nazeef Hussain on 24.03.2023. Annual Day Guest of Honour had Alumni Ahamed Jameel, Abdul Rahman (MD Blue Bell Business Management), Sathish Charan (WriterDirector, Film Industry) on 18.03.2023. Guest of Honour for BSM Cricket Trophy had Alumni Ahamed Jameel and Sabarish inaugurated the function on 12.03.2023. Women's Day Guest of Honour had Alumni Akila Rajesh Voora Property Developer Sales and Marketing Head on 10.03.2023. Alumni Meet Outstanding Award 2023 was given to Ahamed Jameel who receives MSAJCE Outstanding Alumni Award 2023 on 01.02.2023.

The following data is from the Alumni Details table:
First Year Induction 2022 had Alumni Lakshmi Narayanan Societe General, HR Talent Acquisition on 14.11.2022. Graduation Day Special Guest was Mr. Ahamed Jameel Technical Consultant, HCL on 29.10.2022. Symposium Tech Unity Guest had Alumni K Srikanth (Technical Architect, Teleapps), Mohamed Afroze (CEO, Jdigitals) on 28.10.2022. First Alumni Association Meet in Chennai was Organized by MSAJCE on 15.10.2022. Engineers Day 2022 had Best Alumni of Decade: Ahamed Jameel (HCL), Best Engineers: J Abdul Rahman (MD Blue Bell), MM Syed Sultan Allaudeen (MD MM Internationals), A Raju (Infra Tech Manager CITS), L Asim Ali (CMO Customer Labs), N Feroz Khan (Delivery Manager MAERSK Chennai) on 17.09.2022.

Who received the Best Alumni of Decade award from MSAJCE? Who received the Best Alumni Service Award at Golden Jubilee? Who is Majed Arafat in MSAJCE alumni? Who spoke at the First Year Induction in 2022? Which alumni participated in Planning and Monitoring Board meetings? Who is Sheikh Azharuddin from MSAJCE? What award did Ahamed Jameel receive in 2022?

The following data is from the Distinguished Alumni — From Industry table: Zoho recruited 450 students with a package of 6 LPA. Capgemini recruited 320 students with a package of 4.5 LPA. TCS recruited 270 students with a package of 3.6 LPA. Wipro recruited 240 students with a package of 3.5 LPA. Infosys recruited 210 students with a package of 3.6 LPA. Emphasis recruited 190 students with a package of 4 LPA. HCL recruited 150 students with a package of 4 LPA. Tech Mahindra recruited 130 students with a package of 3.6 LPA. Cognizant recruited 120 students with a package of 3.5 LPA. Accenture recruited 110 students with a package of 4.5 LPA.

Further, it covers which MSJCE alumni are in the film industry and whether MSJCE alumni have a startup ecosystem. The keywords include entrepreneur alumni, startup alumni, MSAJCE startup, V5 Innovations, Customer Labs, JFX Events, Pixtronics, Sportasy, J Digitals, Zeemrah Energy, Debugger shirts, alumni CEO, alumni managing director, and film industry alumni.

sections.header: 12. Alumni Meet Programme and Contact Information
sections.text: The following data is from the Alumni Meet Programme table: Alumni meets are conducted every year in the college premises. The following data is from the Contact Information table: For any Alumni related queries, contact the Alumni Association Coordinator, Dr. I. Rajasenan at +91 9443292628 or irajasenan@msajce.edu.in. For any Alumni Association related queries, contact the Alumni Association Secretary, Mr. M. Mohamed Meeran at +91 9443347842 or meeran@msajce.edu.in. For any general queries, contact the Principal, Dr. D. Tensing at +91 9443256254 or principal@msajce.edu.in.

Alumni Meet - 2k23 (2009 - 2020 Batch): The photos are available at <https://photos.app.goo.gl/Qg5EabymfsW948G37>. Alumni Meet - 2021 (2005, 2006 & 2007 Batch): The photos are available at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/alumni/AlumniMeet2021.jpg>. Silver Jubilee Reunion Meet 2025: 500+ Alumnus participated. A Sports Pavilion was donated by the 2001-2005 Batch. It was held on: 01.02.2025. The 18th Graduation Day 22 Feb 2025 photos are available at <https://photos.app.goo.gl/LF3brje3EwmQcbx18>. Alumni Registration Form: <https://forms.gle/CBMdXCDEb9uXVEBv6>. MSAJCE Alumni Association Registration Certificate available on the alumni page. Useful Alumni Links: ALUMNI ASSOCIATION BY-LAWS (Tamil) are available at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/alumni/Alumni-Bylaw.pdf>. ALUMNI MEET MINUTES are available at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/alumni/543-B-ALUMNIMEETMINUTES.pdf>. ALUMNI ASSOCIATION BY-LAWS (English) are available at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/alumni/Alumni-Bylaw-English.pdf>. The ALUMNI MEET REPORT is available at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/alumni/543-C-ALUMNIMEETREPORT.pdf>. College Contact Details: Address: 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103 Phone: +91 99400 04500 Email: [msajce.office@gmail.com](mailto:msajce.office@gmail.com) Website: [www.msajce-edu.in](http://www.msajce-edu.in) Grievance Cell: [grievance@msajce-edu.in](mailto:grievance@msajce-edu.in) Online Application Form: <https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE> Online Fee Payment: <https://www.feepayr.com/> Admission 2026-2027 Flyer: <https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/Admission24-25Flyer.pdf> Students Corner: <https://www.msajce-edu.in/studentscorner.php> College Video: <https://youtu.be/aNVaQWh1Pp4>

Alumni scholarship beneficiaries from 2019 include Aayathul Mufarak A (MECH), Akshaya K (ECE), and Parveen Begum M (CSE). The total alumni scholarship fund stands at Rs. 37,94,972. The following data is from the MSAJCE — Alumni Association Contact table: The Alumni Secretary is Mr. Ahmed Jameel A.M.T and the Alumni President is Dr. K. S. Srinivasan (Principal). The Alumni Registration Form link is https://forms.gle/CBMdXCDEb9uXVEBv6. The address is 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103. The phone number is +91 99400 04500, the email is msajce.office@gmail.com, and the grievance email is grievance@msajce-edu.in. The website is www.msajce-edu.in and the online application link is https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE.

MSAJCE is located at 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103, with a phone number of +91 99400 04500, an email address of msajce.office@gmail.com, and a website at www.msajce-edu.in.
